# Security Policy

## Supported Versions
Only the latest version of the application actively hosted on the main branch of this repository is supported with security updates.

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| **v26.05+**  | :white_check_mark: |
| **< v26.05** | :x:                |

## Our Commitment to Safety
Because this math engine relies entirely on an isolated, tokenized parsing strategy instead of text evaluation methods (`eval()`), the core architecture is inherently protected against traditional code injection vulnerabilities. We are dedicated to keeping it that way.

## Reporting a Vulnerability
If you discover a potential security flaw, logic isolation leak, or vulnerability within our UI or parsing framework, please do not open a public GitHub issue. Instead, please follow these steps:

1. Draft a descriptive overview detailing the structural exploit path.
2. Send the advisory directly to the maintainer via email: **[INSERT YOUR SECURE EMAIL OR REMOVE THIS BRACKET]**.
3. Allow us a reasonable timeframe to analyze, patch, and deploy an update before disclosing any details publicly.

Thank you for helping keep the H₂O Calculator ecosystem safe for everyone!
